creator: sem@FreeBSD.org
text:
email bounced:

   jumper99@gmx.de
     SMTP error from remote mail server after RCPT TO:<jumper99@gmx.de>:
     host mx0.gmx.net [213.165.64.100]: 550-5.7.1 {mx028} The recipient 
does not accept mails from 'FreeBSD.org' over foreign mailservers.
     550-5.7.1 According to the domain's SPF record your host 
'XXX.247.195.XXX' is not a designated sender.
     550 5.7.1 ( http://portal.gmx.net/serverrules )
